isolation.flowValidatorGuidance: Flow Validator Guidance: test-observability hooks (DEV only)
isolation.assignedCommand: npx vitest run src/screens/DashboardScreen/panels/__tests__/EventLogPanel.runtime.test.tsx src/lib/relay/runtimeRelayPump.test.ts src/lib/bifrost/eventLogScrub.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts

steps.action: Run the assigned vitest command and inspect EventLogPanel runtime tests.
steps.expected: SIGN badge rendering and expandable payload fields needed for sign correlation are covered by passing tests.
steps.observed: Command exited 0 with 20/20 tests passing; EventLogPanel tests include SIGN badge coverage in "renders entries newest-first with HH:MM:SS timestamps and badges" and payload rendering in "expands a row to render 2-space-indented JSON of the payload".

steps.action: Run the assigned vitest command and inspect EventLogPanel runtime tests.
steps.expected: ECDH badge rendering is validated by passing tests.
steps.observed: Command exited 0; EventLogPanel test "renders entries newest-first with HH:MM:SS timestamps and badges" includes an ECDH entry and passed.

assertions.title: Peer denial surfaces as SIGNER_POLICY or PEER_POLICY entry

steps.action: Run the assigned vitest command and inspect EventLogPanel typed-badge tests.
steps.expected: Policy-denial badge taxonomy includes SIGNER_POLICY/PEER_POLICY and passes.
steps.observed: Command exited 0; EventLogPanel test "applies typed-badge CSS classes matching the Paper taxonomy" explicitly validates both SIGNER_POLICY and PEER_POLICY badge classes.

steps.action: Run the assigned vitest command and inspect RuntimeRelayPump + EventLogPanel tests.
steps.expected: Relay lifecycle transitions and INFO/ERROR badge taxonomy are validated by passing tests.
steps.observed: Command exited 0; runtimeRelayPump tests covering connect/offline/reconnect lifecycle and socket events passed, and EventLogPanel taxonomy test passed with INFO and ERROR badge classes.

assertions.title: Signing failure correlates to SigningFailedModal via request_id

steps.action: Review the executed test set from the assigned vitest command for explicit SigningFailedModal-to-EventLog request_id correlation coverage.
steps.expected: At least one passing test asserts SigningFailedModal request_id equals Event Log row request_id.
steps.observed: No executed test in the three-file run asserted SigningFailedModal request_id correlation; command evidence is insufficient to conclude pass/fail for this assertion.

assertions.issues: Assigned command did not include a direct assertion for SigningFailedModal request_id correlation.

assertions.title: No secrets in event log payloads

steps.action: Run the assigned vitest command and inspect eventLogScrub + EventLogPanel scrub tests.
steps.expected: Sensitive fields and bfprofile-like values are redacted in rendered payloads.
steps.observed: Command exited 0; all 6 eventLogScrub tests passed (top-level and nested secret redaction, bfprofile redaction, immutability), and EventLogPanel scrub test passed.

assertions.title: Expand state persists across new event ingestion

steps.action: Review the executed test set from the assigned vitest command for expand-state persistence after new event prepends.
steps.expected: A passing test demonstrates an expanded row remains expanded after subsequent event ingestion.
steps.observed: No executed test in the three-file run covered expansion persistence across new event prepends; command evidence is insufficient to conclude pass/fail for this assertion.

assertions.issues: Assigned command did not include a direct expansion-persistence assertion.

assertions.title: Event log + Pending Approvals correlation (M2 + M4)

steps.action: Run the assigned vitest command and inspect EventLogPanel correlation test.
steps.expected: Expanded Event Log JSON exposes the same request_id across correlated rows.
steps.observed: Command exited 0; explicit test "correlation: the expanded JSON exposes the same request_id as the source payload (VAL-CROSS-015)" passed.
